Variable.Name: Pre_SapSprint
Variable.Value: szWinType = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%WinType%") szSxsDll = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%WinSysDir%\Sxs.dll") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Script: Checking for minimal version of '" & szSxsDll & "'..." If szWinType = "Windows 2000" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script: Running on Windows 2000. No need to check for '" & szSxsDll & "'" NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "Pre_SapSprint", "FULFILLED" Else If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( szSxsDll ) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script: Version of '" & szSxsDll & "' = " & NwEngine.Shell.GetFileVersion( szSxsDll ) If NwEngine.DE.ConditionsHandler.Evaluate("%WinSysDir%\Sxs.dll>=5.1.2600.2932") Then NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "Pre_SapSprint", "FULFILLED" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteWarning "Variable-Script: The version of '" & szSxsDll & "' is too low!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteWarning "Variable-Script: The file '" & szSxsDll & "' is missing!" End If End If
